title.en: And it's floating there right now, waiting to b...

content.en:
This drop of liquid gold was as big as a fist, but it was all one, and it was indeed a drop.

And it's floating there right now, waiting to be collected.

Shout!

Ye Tian easily collected this drop of Flowing Away Gold Liquid, and immediately left the Flowing Away Golden Light Realm.

He didn't want to think that after a while, this replica body was unlucky to be scrapped, causing this drop of gold to be gone.

The liquid gold is not always moving, it will move, once it moves and runs, Ye Tian has to look for it again.

Therefore, as long as he found the Flowing Away Gold Liquid, he would try to leave the Flowing Away Golden Light Realm first and send the Flowing Gold Liquid out first.

Soon.

Ye Tian obtained the Exiled Golden Liquid, and the duplicate body entered the Exiled Golden Light Realm again.

On the other side, though, the luck of the will clone is not so good.

......

"It's a !! of the golden thread"

Ye Tian found that a stream of flowing golden threads suddenly appeared around him, and they also cut towards him at an incredible speed.

The speed of dispersion of gold threads is very fast, and there are quite a few of them.

Ye Tian tried to travel through time and space to leave, but countless projections of the stray golden thread appeared in many time and space, and even if he was a perfect control technique, there was no way to let him escape.

"Sure enough, it's hard to dodge the Drifting Golden Thread, if it could be easily dodged, those Ten Realm-level Masters and half-step Perfect Controllers would have already come in and frantically searched for the Drifting Golden Liquid!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Perfect Body!"

"Swallow the Sky Body!"

"Devouring Domain!"

Ye Tian tried all means to resist these flowing golden threads.

However, everything is useless.

The Devouring Domain couldn't devour these Alien Golden Threads at all, and it couldn't affect them at all.

And the Heaven Devouring Battle Body and the Perfect Body couldn't compete with the Drifting Golden Thread, and the Drifting Golden Thread easily broke through the body of control.

The next moment.

Ye Tian's will clone shattered and fell directly.

"The will clone has fallen, and the luck is not good, and a drop of liquid gold has disappeared before it can be found. If it is replaced by another Ten Realms level controller or a half-step perfect controller, I am afraid that I will have to die of depression, such a loss, few people are willing to bear it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

As time passed, the replica body found drop after drop of the Alien Gold Liquid, but after finding eight drops of the Alien Gold Liquid, the replica body was also unlucky enough to encounter the Alien Gold Thread and was killed by the Alien Gold Thread.

"Start condensing and replicating the body again!"

Ye Tian immediately began to slowly condense the copy body, gathering the energy and resources around him, and soon condensed a copy body, and this copy body once again condensed the will clone.

Soon, two more bodies were formed.

Rushing!

The copy body and the will clone once again entered the Drifting Golden Light Realm, looking for the Drifting Golden Liquid.

In the following years, Ye Tian entered the Flowing Golden Light Liquid again and again, and once the copy body fell, he recondensed the copy body.

In this way, there were more and more flowing gold liquid in Ye Tian's hands.

However, the number of miles of liquid gold in the Flowing Golden Light Realm is also limited, and the value of the Flowing Golden Light Realm is that it can continuously generate the liquid of flowing gold.

In addition, there are usually cultivators who enter the Flowing Golden Light Realm, so the number of miles of Flowing Liquid Flowing from the Golden Light Realm is not too many.

After harvesting tens of thousands of Drifting Golden Light Liquid, Ye Tian had a hard time finding Drifting Golden Liquid, and he often fell several times, but he didn't find a drop of Drifting Golden Light Liquid.

In this way, Ye Tian is losing money.

"That's it for now, it's worthless to me to be exiled from the Golden Light Realm at the moment!"

Ye Tian immediately returned to the Daoless Tower.

After coming back, Ye Tian immediately went to hand in the task.

Of course, he didn't hand over all the tens of thousands of drops of liquid gold, only hundreds of drops of liquid gold, after all, liquid liquid gold is extremely rare, if he took out tens of thousands of drops at once, then there would be a problem!

Besides, the flow of gold was a great help to him, so he wanted to keep some of it as well.

However, even if he only took out hundreds of drops of liquid gold, the woman in charge of the task handover of the Wudao Tower's half-step perfect controller looked at Ye Tian with wide eyes.

"You've got so much Liquid of Exile!"

She was amazed.

What's more, Ye Tian was obviously still a Ten Realm-level controller, so he dared to enter the Exile Golden Light Realm, and he also obtained so much Exile Golden Liquid, which can only be described as luck against the sky.

Soon, the task handover was completed, and Ye Tian obtained a large number of contribution points, and then used these contribution points to buy a large amount of Extreme Black Gold and White Shadow Water.

"So much Extreme Black Gold and White Shadow Water is enough for me to break all thirty-six chains of control!"

Ye Tian estimated.

Immediately, he began to announce the retreat practice, and this time those who did not break through the half-step perfect control would definitely not go out.

After all, in the Ruins of Eternity, the half-step perfect master is the new beginning of cultivation, and the Ten Realms-level masters are still too weak, and there is almost no status at all in the Eternal Ruins, belonging to the top existence in the bottom, and the half-step perfect master is considered a middle-level cultivator.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian continued to consume the Extreme Dao Black Gold and White Shadow Water, frantically impacting the control chains.

On this day, Ye Tian broke another control chain, that is, the thirty-fourth control chain.

Then, after a long period of time, Ye Tian once again broke the thirty-fifth chain of control.

At this time, he only needed to break the thirty-sixth chain of control, and he could completely step into the realm of a half-step perfect controller.

"Next, it's time to improve your will and try to break the chain of control at the same time, you can ensure that you can instantly break the boundary of your will and the thirty-sixth chain of control at any time, and you can officially hit the realm of the half-step perfect master!"

Ye Tian calculated.

Before you know it, hundreds of eternal years have passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's Transformation Realm Will was only a trace of boundary away from the half-step Perfect Will, which could be broken at any time, and the thirty-sixth control chain was also shaky, as if it was about to shatter in the next second.

"It's almost, you can impact the half-step perfect controller realm!"

Before breaking through, Ye Tian opened the magic circle of the Pathless Tower, and absorbed the origin energy of the Eternal Ruins through the Pathless Tower, which was also a function of the Pathless Tower, which could easily break the realm.

Rumble!!!!

Endless source energy poured in.

The other cultivators of the Daoless Pagoda knew that there was a member who was attacking the half-step perfect master, but they didn't care, after all, it was just a small matter and didn't deserve their attention.

"Break it for me!"

Ye Tian shouted in his heart.

Click!

The thirty-sixth chain of control shattered, and the body of control stepped into the level of a body of half-step perfect control.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Transformation Realm Will also broke the boundaries and stepped into the half-step Perfect Will Realm.

As the will and the body of control stepped into the half-step perfection level, the power of control in Ye Tian's body also underwent a fundamental transformation, turning into a half-step perfection power.

Bang!!!!

The endless origin energy was absorbed by Ye Tian, prompting his transformation.

Every second that passed, Ye Tian's strength increased a little.

At this time, Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, more and more terrifying!
